Class Survey

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.social.sociology.survey.Survey
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named
public class Survey extends Object implements ComprehensiveIdentification
Represents a complete survey or questionnaire. Implements ComprehensiveIdentification to support dynamic traits and consistent identity.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
